overview: Global Gamers is a video-sharing platform for bus simulator enthusiasts. Players create accounts, upload their gameplay videos, like and browse other creators' content, and unlock premium features.
features: Video upload with drag-and-drop and progress tracking
Public video feed sorted by most recent
Like and unlike videos with live counts
User profiles with uploaded videos and liked content
Premium membership via Stripe for badges and perks
Internet Identity login — no passwords needed
